summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KXGRID new features: Batch Size field fix, Program Highlights, Media Gallery, and Unit Builder. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all features work correctly.

backend_api_tests: Admin login returns correct role for redirect
Create program with batch_size=2 (no min restriction)
Create program with batch_size=8 (leading zero input)
Add media to brand category (video type)
Hidden media not returned in public endpoint
Admin can get all media including hidden
frontend_ui_tests: Landing page loads with Experience KXGRID media gallery section
Admin login redirects to /admin (not student registration)
Programs tab shows Units button for each program
Create Program dialog has Batch Size field (text input, no min restriction)
Create Program dialog has 4 Highlight input fields
Edit Program dialog shows existing highlights and allows editing
Batch Size field accepts value 2 in both create and edit modes
Unit Builder opens from Programs tab via Units button
Unit Builder shows existing units with brand assignment
Add Unit dialog has brand selection dropdown
CMS & Settings tab has Media Gallery section
Media Gallery has 4 categories: Landing, Student, Brand, Crew
Add Media dialog has all required fields (Title, Description, Media Type, Category, URL, Order)
Public Programs page displays custom highlights from database

batch_size_fix.details: Batch Size field now uses type='text' instead of type='number' with min restriction. Accepts any value including 2, 08, etc.

program_highlights.details: 4 editable highlight fields in Create/Edit Program dialogs. Highlights saved to database and displayed on public Programs page.

media_gallery.details: Admin CMS has Media Gallery section with 4 categories (landing, student, brand, crew). Add Media dialog with all fields. Landing page shows Experience KXGRID section with placeholder tiles.

unit_builder.details: Unit Builder accessible via Units button on each program. Create/Edit/Delete units with brand assignment. Units display brand name and color.

admin_login_redirect.details: Admin login correctly redirects to /admin panel, not student registration page.

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests. Existing data: 13 KX brands, 2 programs with highlights, 1 unit with brand assignment.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Batch Size field accepts any value (no min=5 restriction), 2) Program Highlights (4 fields) editable in create/edit forms and displayed on public page, 3) Media Gallery with 4 categories in CMS, 4) Unit Builder with brand assignment working, 5) Admin login redirects to /admin correctly. No issues found.
